creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
I have no idea, but similar issue was reported to me, where HP Smart Array P440 was involved. Instead of 48  drives (45x6T HDD, 3x480G SSD), FreeBSD was able to see only 35 of them (32 +3)), thus skipped 13 x 6T HDD. It was reported to me on IRC a few years ago, the affected setup was running FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE.

Does any logic limiting the number of drives to 2^5 exist ?
